log_export_app_as_skill: [{{name}}] exported the {{appType}} named [{{appName}}] as a skill [{{skillName}}]. API key: [{{apiKeyName}}]
missing_skill_params: skillName and skillDescription are required parameters.
invalid_skill_name: Skill name format is incorrect. Only lowercase letters, digits, and hyphens (-) are supported.
skill_description_too_long: Skill Description length cannot exceed 1024 characters.
archive_error: Failed to generate the skill compression package.
export_skill_modal_hint: When exporting, an API key will be automatically created in [Publishing Channel] for the skill to access the app. Please keep it safe.
export_skill_name_helper: Only lowercase letters, digits, and hyphens (-) are supported, and the length cannot exceed 64 characters.
export_skill_name_error: Name format is incorrect. Only lowercase letters, digits, and hyphens are supported.
export_skill_description_placeholder: Default to app introduction information. If introduction is empty, it is set to empty.
delete_disabled_tip: Unable to delete because associated apps exist.
folder_delete_disabled_tip: The skill has associated apps and cannot be deleted.
confirm_delete_tip: Are you sure you want to delete this skill?
custom_skill_desc: Generate skill outline and framework based on skill requirements.
skill_intro_placeholder: Introduction to usage scenarios and purposes
skill_requirement_tooltip_example:
Objective:
Generate meeting minutes based on meeting records.

Process:
1. Identify meeting topic and participants.
2. Extract key points from the discussion.
3. Draw clear conclusions and make decisions.
4. Extract action items to follow up on and mark the responsible person (if any).

Requirements:
1. Output in structured format.
2. Includes: meeting topic, participants, discussion points, decision, action items
3. Be concise and avoid redundancy.
import_skill_max_size_tip: One-time upload up to {{maxCount}} files, and each file can be up to {{maxSize}}.
move_skill_hint: After moving, the selected skills/folders will inherit the permission settings of the new folder.
copy_skill_confirm: The system will create a new skill with the same configuration, but the permissions will not be copied. Please confirm.
exit_tips: Your changes are not saved and will be discarded if you exit directly.
skill_select_limit_tip: The number of Skills associated with a single app reaches the maximum (100).
editor_select_file_edit: Select a file from the left to start editing.
editor_binary_file_no_preview: Binary file cannot be previewed temporarily.
editor_confirm_delete_content: Are you sure you want to delete this file or directory?
editor_confirm_rename_dirty: The target has unsaved changes. Renaming will cause these changes to be lost. Do you want to continue?
editor_stale_detected: The file has been updated by another conversation. Refresh to view the latest content.
preview_sync_failed_title: Failed to synchronize sandbox. This preview may be based on an earlier version of the file.
